docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORPENO, RAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, SHARON MCNEIL CAROLYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1501 THOMAS AVENUE S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
